audience: Students and families in distance learning communities

hero.title: Remote learning works best when the next step feels small and clear.
hero.subtitle: This site gives students a calm place to get organised, ask for support, and keep moving through the school day online.
quickStartSteps: Open today's lesson or task list
Write down the first small action
Start before you feel fully ready
hero.quickStartNote: The goal is progress, not perfection.

headings.supportTitle: What do you need right now?
headings.supportCaption: Choose the support card that matches the moment.
headings.phraseCaption: Short phrases that make it easier to ask for help early.
headings.workTitle: How to make remote learning work
headings.supportPageIntro: Distance learning can be demanding, and support should be easy to find.

helperCards.title: I keep missing the start
steps: Set a reminder before each lesson.
Check what comes next before one lesson ends.
helperCards.note: A visible routine makes the day feel easier to manage.

helperCards.title: I cannot focus
steps: Close tabs you do not need.

helperCards.title: I need help
steps: Message your teacher or learning mentor.
Say exactly where you are stuck.
Ask for the first step, not the whole answer.
helperCards.note: Early questions prevent bigger stress later.

helperCards.title: I feel stressed
steps: Notice one thing you can do next.

dayExpectations: Start each lesson or task on time if you can.
Check the main learning platform daily.
Ask for help before stress builds up.
Keep a simple routine for breaks, food, and movement.
lessonRules: Teachers may use a mix of live teaching, posted tasks, email, or chat.
Read instructions slowly before you begin.
Keep track of lesson times and deadlines.
Use one main space to store notes and tasks.
onlineExpectations: Let staff know early if something is getting in the way.

supportPhrases.text: I am not sure what the first step is.
Could you explain that another way?

supportBullets: Find the right contact for support
wellbeingHabits: Do something calming after study time.

wellbeingContacts.label: Pastoral support
wellbeingContacts.value: Add the right pastoral or student support contact here

wellbeingContacts.label: Learning support
wellbeingContacts.value: Add the local support email here

wellbeingResources.title: Breathing exercise
wellbeingResources.description: Replace with a local wellbeing video or breathing guide.

wellbeingResources.title: Movement break
wellbeingResources.description: Replace with a short reset or stretch resource.

supportContacts.label: Teacher support
supportContacts.value: Add your preferred teacher contact route

footer.title: Keep the next step small.
footer.text: Remote learning gets easier when support is visible and the day is broken into manageable actions.
footer.note: Use Codex to tailor this version for a school, trust, or community by editing this content file.
